svg.text: ECO-SIM: Jaguar × White-lipped Peccaries - APEX CLOCK
Predator-Prey seasonal dynamics, herd cohesion, and karst refuges

g.text: Dry season compresses peccaries into karst.
Bottleneck raises ambush rates for predators.
Hunting success rises as prey condition falls,
routes narrow near gallery forests and rivers.
Predation feeds back on vigilance and habitat.
Red rings = ambush outcomes; caves as refuges.
Regulation grows as water scarcity increases.
